headline: Baker Hughes (BKR) Stock After Recent Pullback Is The Current Valuation Attractive?
summary: Wondering if Baker Hughes is starting to look expensive or still offers value at current levels? This article breaks down what the recent share price means for you as a potential or existing investor. Baker Hughes last closed at US$56.38, with the stock down about 3.5% over the past week and 15.5% over the past month, while still showing a 19.6% gain year to date and a 49.7% return over the past year. These moves are drawing fresh attention to Baker Hughes as investors reassess the stock in...

headline: Baker Hughes to Deliver Subsea Production Systems to Support Azule Energy’s Greater PAJ Development
summary: Subsea horizontal tree systems engineered to support reliable, optimized production in remote, ultra-deepwater environments Agreement expands Baker Hughes’ offshore operations in Angola, reinforcing its global subsea tree position HOUSTON and LONDON, June 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Baker Hughes (NASDAQ: BKR), an energy technology company, announced Thursday a significant award from Azule Energy to provide subsea production systems to support safe, efficient operations in Angola’s Greater PAJ d
